context.projectOverview: agent-bober Phase 3, Sprint 3 of 5. Give the EXISTING lessons store (src/orchestrator/memory + src/state/memory.ts) lifecycle hygiene: occurrence-weighted ranking in retrieveRelevantLessons, a pure deterministic pruneLessons that quarantines below-threshold/stale + deterministically-contradictory lessons into QUARANTINE.md (never deleting), exposed as `bober memory prune`. Independent of the facts store (Sprints 1-2).

completedSprints.title: SQLite facts store + CLI
completedSprints.summary: Facts store (separate from lessons). Not touched by this sprint.

completedSprints.title: Reconcile-on-write
completedSprints.summary: Facts reconcile. Not touched by this sprint.

decisionsLocked.purity: pruneLessons is a PURE function with injected `now` — no Date.now()/new Date() inside hygiene.ts or retrieve.ts core; stamp now at the CLI boundary.
decisionsLocked.neverDelete: Quarantine (move to QUARANTINE.md + rewrite INDEX.md without them) — NEVER delete the per-lesson <lessonId>.md files. Reversible by design.
decisionsLocked.rankingInvariant: Token-overlap stays DOMINANT (existing C1 'non-matching keyword → empty' must still hold); occurrences only boost/tiebreak. Stable sort: overlap desc → occurrence-weighted → lessonId asc.
decisionsLocked.conflictDeterministic: Contradiction = two lessons sharing the same signature key with opposing markers — move BOTH to quarantine, drop neither. No LLM.

principles: Read .bober/principles.md. Gates: TS strict (zero errors), ESLint consistent-type-imports (`import type`), ESM .js specifiers, no `any` unjustified, section comments, CLI handlers never throw (process.exitCode=1), deterministic/byte-stable output, conventional commit `bober(sprint-3): ...`.
